aposticha: O Savior, do not cut me down, a sinner, like the barren fig tree,* but grant that I may live many more years,* watering my soul with tears of repentance,* so that I may bring You the fruit of good works.
Celebrating the memory of Your holy martyrs,* we glorify You, O Christ, crying out:* Lord, glory be to You!
Since You are the Sun of righteousness,* enlighten the hearts of those who sing to You:* Glory to You, O Lord!
Through the prayers of the Mother of God,* grant peace to our lives, for we cry out to You:* Glory to You, O merciful Lord.
